use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and landing pages
Destructive action triggers with confirmation patterns
Secondary navigation and menu item buttons
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbars and controls
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Built with Radix UI Slot for asChild composition, CVA for variant management, and Tailwind CSS for styling. Supports standard button interactions including hover states, focus indicators, and disabled states.
